original_text: Balance sheet metrics indicate moderate leverage with adequate liquidity positioning. The current ratio in Q4 2025 was 0.9964 (K008), derived from current assets of $10,163,000,000 (C049) against current liabilities of $10,200,000,000 (C050), suggesting working capital is roughly balanced. Leverage remains conservative with debt-to-equity at 0.5720 (K009), calculated from total debt of $6,648,000,000 (C047) and stockholders' equity of $11,623,000,000 (C045). Net debt position was $1,217,000,000 (K010) after accounting for cash equivalents of $5,431,000,000 (C046), indicating the company maintains substantial cash reserves relative to its debt obligations.
revised_text: Balance sheet metrics indicate moderate leverage with adequate liquidity positioning. The current ratio in Q4 2025 was 0.9964 (K008), derived from current assets of $10,163,000,000 (C051) against current liabilities of $10,200,000,000 (C052), suggesting working capital is roughly balanced. Leverage remains conservative with debt-to-equity at 0.5720 (K009), calculated from total debt of $6,648,000,000 (C049) and stockholders' equity of $11,623,000,000 (C047). Net debt position was $1,217,000,000 (K010) after accounting for cash equivalents of $5,431,000,000 (C048), indicating the company maintains substantial cash reserves relative to its debt obligations.
changes_summary: Fixed five citation mismatches: (1) Current assets citation changed from C049 to C051, (2) Current liabilities citation changed from C050 to C052, (3) Total debt citation changed from C047 to C049, (4) Stockholders' equity citation changed from C045 to C047, (5) Cash equivalents citation changed from C046 to C048. All numerical values remain unchanged as they were correct; only the supporting chunk references were corrected to match the actual evidence.
